# MTLAttributeFormat.floatRGB9E5

**Case**

One packed 32-bit value representing pixel data containing 9-bit float red, green, and blue channels, and a 5-bit float shared exponent channel.

## Declaration

```swift
case floatRGB9E5
```

## Discussion

This data format is identical to [doc://com.apple.metal/documentation/Metal/MTLPixelFormat/rgb9e5Float], and used in compute functions for manipulating pixels.

## Pixel data types

- **MTLAttributeFormat.uchar4Normalized_bgra**: Four unsigned normalized 8-bit values, arranged as blue, green, red, and alpha components.
- **MTLAttributeFormat.floatRG11B10**: One packed 32-bit value representing pixel data containing 11-bit float red and green channels, and a 10-bit float blue channel.
